subcodes.first_line: O servant of God! The trace of thy musk-laden pen hath reached me, its contents were delightful and betokened orientation to the supreme Kingdom [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده الهی اثر خامه مشکین رسید مضامین دلنشین بود و دلیل توجه بملکوت علیین
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @love of God, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @Mosaic imagery, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of
